title: asperula oligantha var. conferta
intro: Asperula oligantha var. conferta, also known as the lesser wood sorrel, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include acting as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Asperula oligantha var. conferta include treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and reducing inflammation and swelling in the body. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
